# ZodiacMatch — Chinese Zodiac Compatibility

> Find your animal match. Pick two Chinese zodiac signs and discover compatibility scores, deep insights, and element dynamics. Free, instant, no sign-up.

## Core pages

- https://zodiacmatch.xyz/ — Compatibility checker tool with all 66 animal pairings
- https://zodiacmatch.xyz/blog — Chinese zodiac compatibility articles and guides
- https://zodiacmatch.xyz/about — About ZodiacMatch
- https://zodiacmatch.xyz/contact — Contact page
- https://zodiacmatch.xyz/privacy — Privacy policy

## Blog

- [Chinese Zodiac Compatibility: The Complete Guide to Love Match](https://zodiacmatch.xyz/blog/chinese-zodiac-compatibility-complete-guide) — Complete guide to all 12 animal signs, their best and worst matches, the five elements, and how to find your perfect love match.
- [Rat and Dragon Compatibility: Why They're the Most Powerful Chinese Zodiac Match](https://zodiacmatch.xyz/blog/rat-and-dragon-compatibility) — Why these two signs create an unstoppable power couple in love, business, and life.
- [Tiger and Horse Compatibility: A Passionate, Freedom-Loving Match](https://zodiacmatch.xyz/blog/tiger-and-horse-compatibility) — Why these independent, adventurous signs create one of the most exciting and lasting pairings.
- [The 5 Most Compatible Chinese Zodiac Signs: Best Love Matches Ranked](https://zodiacmatch.xyz/blog/most-compatible-chinese-zodiac-signs) — Top 5 most compatible pairings ranked with scores and why they work.
- [Chinese Zodiac Elements Compatibility: How Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, and Water Affect Your Love Match](https://zodiacmatch.xyz/blog/chinese-zodiac-elements-compatibility) — How the Five Elements interactions can transform a match.
- [Dragon and Monkey Compatibility: Wit Meets Charisma in a Legendary Pairing](https://zodiacmatch.xyz/blog/dragon-and-monkey-compatibility) — Why these two ambitious signs create a relationship full of excitement and intelligence.
- [Horse and Goat Compatibility: The Six Harmony Love Match for 2026](https://zodiacmatch.xyz/blog/horse-and-goat-compatibility) — How this energetic and gentle Six Harmony pairing creates lasting love.
- [Snake and Monkey Compatibility: A Six Harmony Power Couple](https://zodiacmatch.xyz/blog/snake-and-monkey-compatibility) — Why these two intelligent, strategic signs create an unshakeable bond.
- [Ox and Snake Compatibility: The Quiet, Unshakeable Bond](https://zodiacmatch.xyz/blog/ox-and-snake-compatibility) — How patience, discipline, and deep understanding create a love that lasts.
- [Rabbit and Pig Compatibility: A Gentle, Loving Match Made in Heaven](https://zodiacmatch.xyz/blog/rabbit-and-pig-compatibility) — How these gentle, kind-hearted signs create a love built on trust and comfort.
- [Dragon Compatibility: Which Chinese Zodiac Signs Match Best with Dragon?](https://zodiacmatch.xyz/blog/dragon-compatibility-best-match) — Best, good, and challenging matches for Dragon in love, plus Five Elements effects.

## Data

The site uses a structured dataset of the 12 Chinese zodiac animals (Rat, Ox, Tiger, Rabbit, Dragon, Snake, Horse, Goat, Monkey, Rooster, Dog, Pig) with:
- Compatibility scores (0–100) for all 66 unique pairings based on traditional Six Harmony and Three Harmony relationships
- Five Elements (Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, Water) associated with each birth year
- Element interaction cycles: creation (Sheng) and destruction (Ke)
- Personality traits and years for each animal sign

## Optional

- [Chinese Zodiac — Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chinese_zodiac)
- [Five Elements — Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wuxing_(Chinese_philosophy))
